texto: The massive prison construction represents a commitment by our nation to plan for social failure by spending billions of dollars to lock up hundreds of thousands of people while at the same time cutting billions of dollars from programs that would provide opportunity to young Americans.
explicacao: Citação de Steven Donziger sobre passagem do tempo e prioridades. “The massive prison construction represents a commitment by our nation to plan for social failure …” articula tempo, prison, the-real-war-on-crime em registro de tempo, com relevância para contextos como termino e the-real-war-on-crime.
